title: sharedFormula results in empty cells
author: Tilogorn
body:
Executing this minimal working example:

```js
var Excel = require('exceljs');

var workbook_write_stream = new Excel.stream.xlsx.WorkbookWriter({
    filename: './test.xlsx'
});

var sheet1 = workbook_write_stream.addWorksheet('yua');

// Add Data
for (var i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
    sheet1.getCell('A' + i).value = i * 10;
}

// Master formula
sheet1.getCell('B1').value = { formula: 'A1*2'};

// Shared formulas
for (var j = 2; j <= 10; j++) {
    sheet1.getCell('B' + j).value = {
        sharedFormula: 'B1'
    };
}

console.log(sheet1.getCell('B3').formula);
// undefined

sheet1.commit();
workbook_write_stream.commit()
    .then(function () {
        console.log('Ready');
    });

```
Leads to this table:

![Bildschirmfoto vom 2019-05-27 11-27-50](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/7524854/58410566-b8689700-8072-11e9-9e4a-7470f22bede7.png)

Expected:

![Bildschirmfoto vom 2019-05-27 11-28-52](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/7524854/58410576-bacaf100-8072-11e9-8d4a-b73ed2bb58c5.png)

I used this example from the docs, am I missing something?

https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs#shared-formula

Edit: This debugging output may help:

```js
console.log(console.log(sheet1.getCell('B3'));
```
